ValidationRule.description: Signature date is mandatory when an Agreement is not in Negotiation
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( !$User.BypassValidationRules__c, NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'In Negotiation')), OR( ISNULL( SignedDate__c ), ISBLANK( SignedDate__c ) ), $RecordType.Name = 'Intermediary Agreement' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: A Signature Date is mandatory for this Status
